decision_rationale: Repair plan addresses all 4 stress findings: F-001 (subprocess timeout via setTimeout + AbortSignal in execSQL), F-002 (remove inner Effect.orDie so InvalidArgumentsError propagates), F-003 (add single-line comment and string literal stripping to firewall), F-004 (rename idleTimeoutMs→queueTimeoutMs, add executionTimeoutMs). All repairs are narrow, targeted, and within the duckdb-query-tool boundary.
